purpose: Versioned fixed monthly prices for OPL compute and storage entitlements.
machineBoundary: Customer charges are fixed integer calendar-month prices. Provider procurement costs never alter a customer charge.

lifecycle.removalCondition: Replace only with a newer current pricing contract and matching entitlement migration.

storageChargeRule: Calculate total CNY cents for all 10GB blocks, then convert once to USD micros with ceiling division.
rules: All charge decisions use integer CNY cents and USD micros.
Unknown compute packages and storage sizes outside the 10GB step fail before external side effects.
A resource keeps its price snapshot for the current period.
Provider costs are separate reconciliation evidence and never a customer pricing formula.
